123.name: Shirams Private Study
123.description: An eerie feeling overwhelms your senses as you enter this room. Shivering torches form dancing shadows on the wall all around you. The ground looks like stone, but seems to cushion your feet as you walk on it. Everywhere you look, you see piles of books stacked on each other. Near the back of the room, is a wooden desk with a chair sitting behind it. A set of stairs lead back up to the tower.

npcs.name: Shiram
npcs.description: Just by looking at this wizard you get a feel of the magnitude of power he posesses. He reads over his spell books one by one as if nothing in the

115.name: Forest Trail
115.description: You've come to a small trail which branches off of the forest to the east. Pine needles crunch beneath your feet as you tread on, following the path. Off to both sides of the trail, squirrels dash around and birds chirp together. There is a gentle breeze in the air, cooling your face and causing the massive trees above you to sway slightly. The trail continues to the east and west.

116.name: Forest Trail
116.description: The trail curves here, extending to the east and south. The smell of pine trees overwhelms you as you pass through this section of the woods. You can hear the faint sound of rushing water to the south, but it is drowned out by the rustling of the trees. The trail continues to the east and south.

npcs.name: Muscular orc
npcs.description: Disdain shows right through his face, no doubt aimed at previous clan members. He snarls angrily as he stomps through the woods. I'd leave him alone if I were you.

117.name: Stone Bridge
117.description: The trees have parted slightly here, allowing room for a miniature stream. You can see it flowing westward, while your view to the east is partially obstructed by trees. A solid stone bridge stretches from one edge of the creek to the other. To the north, the trees thicken and lead you back into the forest. A huge iron gate can be seen to the south.

npcs.name: Sivera
npcs.description: over her shoulders like silk. However, the confused look on her face along with a subtle frown suggests she is slightly lost.

118.name: The Gateway
118.description: Before you, stands an enormous iron gate. Piercing spikes point at the sky every few inches atop it. Thick brush creeps up on the stone wall, which extends to the east and west on each side of the gate. A set of gigantic, grey hinges, which look as if they would be impossible to force open, grip the gates tightly. To the south, a tower rises up behind the gate, and a small river lies to the north.

119.name: Courtyard
119.description: You stand in the center of a wide courtyard which sits just in front of a mighty tower. A carpet of grass covers the ground, and pleasing foliage lines the edge of the grounds. To the north, the iron gate leads back into the forest, and a stone tower stands to the south.

120.name: Stone Entrance Chamber
120.description: This room seems to be the main entryway to the tower. The entire chamber appears to be made of stone. An archway leads out to the north, and the sunlight creeping through it paints half of the room light grey. The western end of the chamber is lit by torches, which are scattered along the wall. A second exit to the west leads to a larger chamber, and you may travel south, through the archway.

121.name: Base of the Spiral Staircase
121.description: You've come to what looks like the center of the tower. The room doesn't have any torches, but is lit by light emanating from the east and south. In the center of the room, an enormous spiral staircase ascends through the ceiling. Every now and then, a bright flash from the south catches your eye.

122.name: Laboratory
122.description: This room seems like a typical laboratory. Stone shelves protrude from the walls and support an assortment of mystical contents. Potions and wands, separated by color, sit on a lower group of shelves. The potions themselves seem to radiate a light which illuminates the room. Among all of the equipment is a seemingly bare table. Garok misses you. You bring your dagger down on Garok. (35)

npcs.name: Garok
npcs.description: This orc seems to be particularly interested in magical devices of the elves. He sits playing with old equipment, hoping to find something neat.

2695.name: Supply Room
2695.description: The spiral staircase comes to a stop on a platform here. It looks like it used to be used for some sort of a supply room. A set of dusty, empty racks stick to the wall, and a number of storage crates are set in a corner. One staircase leads back down to the ground level, while a second staircase climbs to the top of the tower. Through an archway to the east, you can see a large chamber.

2696.name: Olaks Quarters
2696.description: You are standing in the center of a huge chamber which serves as the home of Olak. Pictures on the wall have been torn down to allow room for an assortment of swords and shields. A collection of heads rests above the doorway, covering up what looks like ancient elven writing. Through the passage to the west, you can see a spiral staircase which leads up and down.

npcs.name: Olak
npcs.description: He makes a point to shout everything he says and looks extremely irritated

2697.name: Watch Tower
2697.description: You are standing at the very top of this mighty tower. The first thing you notice about it is that it has no walls. The floor comes to an abrupt halt at the edge of the tower. You also find it odd that unlike most other towers, this one was built in the shape of an octagon. the spiral staircase reaches up from below, and comes to an end in the middle of the platform. You can see the land for miles in all directions from this point. Since there isn't any wall surrounding the tower, you could jump off, if you really had to.

npcs.name: Trunt
npcs.description: Amazingly, this orc seems to be deep in thought. He wears a pair of fine lenses that look rather odd on an orc. Nevertheless, he appears to be as cruel and disgusting as any orc you've ever seen in the past.
